'''Clorr''' was a former [[Prison/Legends|prison]] worker on [[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]].

==Biography==
When [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] took over control of [[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]] from the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]], Clorr was thrown into the [[Spice mines of Kessel/Legends|spice mines]] with many other [[Security guard/Legends|guards]] and workers. He was [[Death/Legends|killed]] by an [[energy spider]] in [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]].

{{Char-stub}}
